title: Ice Future Value Capstone
intendedTensionBeat: Two rescues compete: one path is visible but dock-costly, while the frozen route is the correct future-value investment.
intendedReleaseBeat: Choosing the iced route first creates a controlled rescue sequence and proves the player understands the band.
expectedPath: Read the frozen route as the better rescue investment, open it before broad visible clears, rescue the priority puppy, then pivot through a planned dock-safe sequence.
expectedFailMode: Player chases the visible route first, overfills dock or loses water tempo, then discovers the frozen route too late.
designNotes: Band capstone. Should prove ice as future value, not just ice as obstruction. No vine; save broader mixed pressure for later bands.
